pi_items.source: Verified against setup_task.sh Python data generator script and task instructions which consistently use 135.50 and 4.25 respectively.

setup_task.sh explicitly writes the generated CSV data to this path.

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the task operates on a synthetically generated APC ridership dataset, created dynamically via a Python script in setup_task.sh. The source file path (/home/ga/Documents/Spreadsheets/apc_ridership_q1_2024.csv), the expected output workbook path (/home/ga/Documents/Spreadsheets/transit_performance_q1.xlsx), and the exact expected cost rates (hourly: 135.50, mileage: 4.25) perfectly match the calculation instructions, setup scripts, and verifier.py logic.
